---
title: "Data Analysis Overview"
format: pptx
---

# Dataset Summary

| Dataset | Rows | Columns |
|---------|------|---------|
| cluster_control.csv | 100 | 5 |
| srs_sample_students.csv | 1000 | 5 |

---

## Cluster Control – Key Statistics

- **Average transaction amount**: $2167.56
- **Most common product category**: Clothing (74/100)
- **Date range**: 2024-01-01 to 2024-06-30

---

## Student Records – Key Statistics

- **Average GPA**: 2.73
- **Average year of study**: 2.50
- **Enrollment status**: 84% Full‑time, 16% Part‑time

---

## Top 5 Highest Transactions (Cluster)

| Transaction ID | Customer ID | Amount | Category | Date |
|----------------|-------------|--------|----------|------|
| 665 | 4325 | 192.82 | Clothing | 2024-06-07 |
| 521 | 4110 | 180.23 | Clothing | 2024-05-03 |
| 4235 | 3319 | 56.90 | Clothing | 2024-02-12 |
| 4335 | 1397 | 155.87 | Clothing | 2024-05-07 |
| 4404 | 2031 | 152.80 | Clothing | 2024-03-01 |

---

*Sources: (cluster_control.csv-cluster_control_7a234c396d_3) (cluster_control.csv-cluster_control_7a234c396d_18) (cluster_control.csv-cluster_control_7a234c396d_4) (cluster_control.csv-cluster_control_7a234c396d_5) (cluster_control.csv-cluster_control_7a234c396d_19)*
